name: Way To Hell
short_description: Dark fps shooter where player mission is to find missing pentagrams in 6 different maps and avoid deathly enemies
detailed_description:
STORY:

Player controls lonely warrior character in this first person shooter with various enviroments. Player mission is to find pentagrams in 6 different levels. Finding pentagram finish levels and gives steam achievements. There are several different and dangerous enemies like slow Crawler monster, fast flying insects and most deathly bloody monster who has lot of power and they are also very fast. Player can collect and use different weapons, like rocket weapon, machine gun, shotgun, grenade launcher etc. Also player can pick up different items like more health, shield which protect limited time and increase player damage. Player starts levels without any weapons and his mission is to find different weapons and ammos so he can kill deathly enemies. After death player restart to start point. 6 different styled levels

FEATURES:

- 6 levels with steam achievements
- Different weapons like: shotgun, grenade launcher, laser weapon, rocket launcher and riflegun
- Collect ammo pick-ups
- Health and shield pickups

  • Collect pentagrams to finish levels and achieve steam achievements
    - Different enemies:
    - Slowly walking monster
    - Deathly flying insegths
    - Big and fast bloody monsters
